devdoc.details: This contract extends the DelegatorCore contracts. It provides functionality to validate P256 and EOA signatures.The signers that control the DeleGator are EOA, raw P256 keys or WebAuthn P256 public keys.

AddressEmptyCode(address).details: There's no code at `target` (it is not a contract).

CannotRemoveLastSigner().details: Error emitted when the last signer is attempted to be removed

ECDSAInvalidSignatureLength(uint256).details: The signature has an invalid length.

ECDSAInvalidSignatureS(bytes32).details: The signature has an S value that is in the upper half order.

ERC1967InvalidImplementation(address).details: The `implementation` of the proxy is invalid.

ERC1967NonPayable().details: An upgrade function sees `msg.value > 0` that may be lost.

KeyNotOnCurve(uint256,uint256).details: Error emitted when a P256 key is not on the curve

NotDelegationManager().details: Error thrown when the caller is not the delegation manager.

UUPSUnauthorizedCallContext().details: The call is from an unauthorized context.

UUPSUnsupportedProxiableUUID(bytes32).details: The storage `slot` is unsupported as a UUID.

UnsupportedExecType(bytes1).details: Error thrown when an execution with an unsupported ExecType was made

Initialized(uint64).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

OwnershipTransferred(address,address).details: This emits when ownership of a contract changes.

RemovedP256Key(bytes32,uint256,uint256).details: Event emitted when a P256 key is removed

SentPrefund(address,uint256,bool).details: Event emitted when prefunding is sent.

SetDelegationManager(address).details: Emitted when the Delegation manager is set

SetEntryPoint(address).details: Emitted when the EntryPoint is set

Upgraded(address).details: Emitted when the implementation is upgraded.

params._keyId: The ID of the key to be added

params._delegationManager: the address of the trusted DelegationManager contract that will have root access to this contract

execute((address,uint256,bytes)).details: This method is intended to be called through a UserOp which ensures the invoker has sufficient permissionsThis convenience method defeaults to reverting on failure and a single execution.

execute(bytes32,bytes).details: Related: @erc7579/MSAAdvanced.solThis method is intended to be called through a UserOp which ensures the invoker has sufficient permissions

The address of the current UUPS Logic contract.

getInitializedVersion().details: This version number is moreso the count of initializations that have occurred for this proxy contract.Related: UUPS

params._keyId: The ID of the key to get

returns.x_: The X value of the public key
returns.y_: The Y value of the public key

params._key: The key to use for the nonce

returns._0: uint256 The next sequential nonce for the key provided

initialize(address,string[],uint256[],ui.details: Used by UUPS proxies to initialize the contract stateContract owners require staking in the EntryPoint to enable signature verification during UserOp validation.The Key ID of a WebAuthn P256 should be used for data retention, otherwise a random string should be used

params._keyIds: The list of key Ids to be added
params._owner: The address of the EOA owner to set
params._xValues: List of Public key's X coordinates
params._yValues: List of Public key's Y coordinates

params._delegationHash: the hash of the delegation to check for disabled status.

params._hash: The hash of the data signed.

returns.magicValue_: A bytes4 magic value which is EIP1271_MAGIC_VALUE(0x1626ba7e) if the signature is valid, returns SIG_VALIDATION_FAILED(0xffffffff) if there is a signature mismatch and reverts (for all other errors).

onERC1155BatchReceived(address,address,u.details: Handles the receipt of a multiple ERC-1155 token types. This function is called at the end of a `safeBatchTransferFrom` after the balances have been updated. NOTE: To accept the transfer(s), this must return `bytes4(keccak256("onERC1155BatchReceived(address,address,uint256[],uint256[],bytes)"))` (i.e. 0xbc197c81, or its own function selector).

params.data: Additional data with no specified format
params.from: The address which previously owned the token
params.ids: An array containing ids of each token being transferred (order and length must match values array)
params.operator: The address which initiated the batch transfer (i.e. msg.sender)
params.values: An array containing amounts of each token being transferred (order and length must match ids array)

onERC1155Received(address,address,uint25.details: Handles the receipt of a single ERC-1155 token type. This function is called at the end of a `safeTransferFrom` after the balance has been updated. NOTE: To accept the transfer, this must return `bytes4(keccak256("onERC1155Received(address,address,uint256,uint256,bytes)"))` (i.e. 0xf23a6e61, or its own function selector).

params.data: Additional data with no specified format
params.from: The address which previously owned the token
params.id: The ID of the token being transferred
params.operator: The address which initiated the transfer (i.e. msg.sender)
params.value: The amount of tokens being transferred

onERC721Received(address,address,uint256.details: Whenever an {IERC721} `tokenId` token is transferred to this contract via {IERC721-safeTransferFrom} by `operator` from `from`, this function is called. It must return its Solidity selector to confirm the token transfer. If any other value is returned or the interface is not implemented by the recipient, the transfer will be reverted. The selector can be obtained in Solidity with `IERC721Receiver.onERC721Received.selector`.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

params._executionCallDatas: An array of `Execution` structs representing the executions to be executed.
params._modes: An array of `ModeCode` structs representing the mode of execiton for each execution callData.
params._permissionContexts: An array of bytes where each element is made up of an array of `Delegation` structs that are used to validate the authority given to execute the corresponding execution on the root delegator, ordered from leaf to root.

reinitialize(uint8,address,string[],uint.details: Call this method when updating logic contracts on the DeleGatorProxyThe owner SHOULD be an EOA. Contract owners require staking in the EntryPoint to enable signature verification during UserOp validation.Used by UUPS proxies to initialize the contract state

params._deleteP256Keys: Boolean indicating whether to delete the P256 keys
params._keyIds: The list of key Ids to be added
params._owner: The address of the EOA owner to set
params._version: The initilized version number of the proxy using this logic contract
params._xValues: List of Public key's X coordinates
params._yValues: List of Public key's Y coordinates

params._keyId: The ID of the key to be removed

params._newOwner: The address of the new owner

params._keyIds: The list of key Ids to be added
params._owner: The address of the owner to set
params._xValues: List of Public key's X coordinates
params._yValues: List of Public key's Y coordinates

params._data: Data to send as msg.data to the implementation to initialize the proxied contract.
params._newImplementation: Address of the new logic contract to use.

params._data: Data to send as msg.data to the implementation to initialize the proxied contract.
params._newImplementation: Address of the new logic contract to use.

params._missingAccountFunds: The missing funds from the account

params._withdrawAddress: Address to withdraw the amount to
params._withdrawAmount: Amount to be withdraw from the entry point

devdoc.title: HybridDeleGator Contract

addDeposit().notice: Deposits more funds for this account in the entry point

addKey(string,uint256,uint256).notice: Adds a new key as a signer that can sign on behalf of the DeleGator

disableDelegation((address,address,bytes.notice: Disables a delegation from being used

enableDelegation((address,address,bytes3.notice: Enables a delegation to be used

execute((address,uint256,bytes)).notice: Executes an Execution from this contract

execute(bytes32,bytes).notice: Executes an Execution from this contract

getDeposit().notice: Gets the current account's deposit in the entry point

getDomainHash().notice: This method returns the domain hash used for signing typed data

getImplementation().notice: Retrieves the address of the current UUPS Logic contract

getInitializedVersion().notice: Retrieves the version of the current UUPS Logic contract

getKey(string).notice: Returns the P256 public key coordinates of a given key ID if it is a signer

getKeyIdHashes().notice: Returns all P256 key IDs that are signers for this contract

getKeyIdHashesCount().notice: Returns count of signer P256 keys

getNonce().notice: Returns the next sequential nonce using a static key

getNonce(uint192).notice: Returns the next sequential nonce using a custom key

getPackedUserOperationHash((address,uint.notice: Provides the typed data hash for a PackedUserOperation

getPackedUserOperationTypedDataHash((add.notice: Returns the formatted hash to sign for an EIP712 typed data signatureReturns an EIP712 typed data hash for a given UserOp

initialize(address,string[],uint256[],ui.notice: Initializes the HybridDeleGator state by setting the owners.

isDelegationDisabled(bytes32).notice: Checks if the delegation is disabled

isValidSignature(bytes32,bytes).notice: Verifies the signatures of the signers.

redeemDelegations(bytes[],bytes32[],byte.notice: Redeems a delegation on the DelegationManager and executes the specified executions on behalf of the root delegator.

reinitialize(uint8,address,string[],uint.notice: Reinitializes the HybridDeleGator state by setting the owners.

removeKey(string).notice: Removes an existing key from the list of signers

transferOwnership(address).notice: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account.

updateSigners(address,string[],uint256[].notice: Updates all P256 signers and the owner of the contract

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).notice: Clears storage by default and updates the logic contract in use.

upgradeToAndCallAndRetainStorage(address.notice: Retains storage and updates the logic contract in use.

validateUserOp((address,uint256,bytes,by.notice: Validates a UserOp signature and sends any necessary funds to the EntryPoint

withdrawDeposit(address,uint256).notice: This method withdraws funds of this account from the entry point

userdoc.notice: There can be multiple signers configured for the DeleGator but only one signature is needed for a valid signature.There must be at least one active signer.
